## Goal

Describe the aim of this change.

## Linked issue

Closes #

## Non-goals

Describe what is intentionally not included in this change.

## Risk classification

- Risk: [low|medium|high]
- Reasons:
- Sensitive paths:

## Data boundary

Explain how data boundaries are preserved.

## Schema / API / environment changes

List any schema migrations, new APIs, or environment variables added.

## Tests and evidence

Summarize tests added or updated, plus results.

## Runtime evidence

- Required: Describe runtime evidence required (e.g., E2E, preview smoke)
- Result: Summarize results or attach artifacts
- Artifact: Provide artifact link or description

## Rollout and rollback

Describe how to enable the change, monitor rollout, and revert if necessary.

## Remaining risks

List known open risks after this change.

## Merge recommendation

- [ ] Auto-merge candidate
- [ ] Human approval required
- [ ] Blocked
